narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly and no more of month after month of promises from Trump or threats from the east….POOF..it’s all over …thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries”
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The quote highlights and seemingly advocates for a catastrophic negative outcome (nuclear war) for Western countries, blaming it on their own un-elected bureaucrats, which fits the narrative of predicting or emphasizing adverse consequences for the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
